name: Bruschetta with Tomato, Basil, and Mozzarella Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ripe plum tomatoes, peeled and seeded
1/4 lb Fresh Mozzarella, cut into 1/2 cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice tomatoes into 1/2 inch pieces; drain over a bowl for 1/2 hour to remove excess liquid.
2. Combine all relish ingredients except the Mozzarella cheese in a small non-aluminum bowl. Stir well and taste for seasoning.
3. Prepare grill for medium hot grilling.
4. Place bread on the grill; grill each side just until grill marks appear, then remove and place on serving platter.
5. Rub the bread pieces on each side with cut edges of the peeled garlic cloves.
6. Add cheese to the relish, spoon mixture over each baguette slice, and drizzle the remaining 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil over top.
7. Sprinkle with freshly ground black pepper and serve. Makes 6 servings.
